item.title: Linux SSH Hardening
item.author: Author
item.description: SSH with Username and Password 1 ssh <hostname OR IP Address> 1 ssh <user>@<hostname OR IP Address> SSH with Public and Private Key Generate Keys 1 ssh-keygen -t rsa Copy Public Key to the Server 1 ssh-copy-id mark@node01 Check the Copied Public Key on the Server 1 cat /home/mark/.ssh/authorized_keys Access the Server 1 ssh node01 Hardening SSH Service 1 vi /etc/ssh/sshd_config 1 2 3 4 .
